controls.detail: Tenant audit dirs stay inside the managed SaaS root.
At least one tenant workspace exists.
Cross-tenant queries are disabled by default.
Only external secret references are stored.
Identity provider manifest exists.
Market-data vendor manifest exists.
LLM provider manifest exists.
Regulated partner manifest exists.
Observability provider manifest exists.
Observability manifest and events exist.
Regulated partner production integration is not enabled by manifest.
External integrations are visible but not treated as production validated.

integrations.name: OIDC Contract
integrations.notes: OIDC discovery document must be validated before production.

integrations.name: Licensed Market Data Contract
integrations.notes: License and redistribution status must be approved before production.

integrations.name: Model Gateway Contract
integrations.notes: External model adapter must pass the council eval suite before production.

integrations.name: Regulated Partner Contract
integrations.notes: Legal, market-access, and production-adapter approvals are not assumed.

integrations.name: Managed Logs Contract
integrations.notes: Production exporter must pass PII and retention checks.

controls.detail: Identity directory is initialized.
At least one identity principal exists.
Tenant memberships refer to known managed SaaS tenants.
Persisted sessions contain hashes only, never raw bearer values.
Identity token policy blocks raw session token storage.
Durable storage manifest exists.
Storage root stays inside the managed SaaS root.
Tenant object paths use tenant-scoped storage prefixes.
At least one durability checkpoint exists.
Checkpoint files stay under the durable storage checkpoint prefix.
Storage manifest and object records do not store raw secrets.
This phase defines the durable storage contract without connecting production cloud storage.
